summary: Tested Mira AI personalization fix and Care bundles in PricingHub. All 3 requested features verified working: 1) Mira context endpoint returns personalized greeting with user and pet name when logged in, 2) PetSoulScore animated component displays in navbar, 3) Care bundles API returns 5 bundles correctly.

details: Without auth: Returns 'Welcome to our Travel services! Sign in to get pet-specific travel recommendations.'
With auth: Returns 'Hi **Dipali**! Planning travel with **Mojo**? I have Mojo's profile ready to find the perfect pet-friendly options.'
Personalized greeting includes user's first name and pet's name
No 'Sign in' message shown for logged-in users
Non-logged-in users see 'Pet Soul™' button linking to /pet-soul
Logged-in users see animated circular progress ring with score percentage
Score shows '0%' with tooltip 'Complete your Pet Soul for better recommendations!'
Component links to /my-pets for logged-in users
Bundles include: Complete Grooming Kit, Daily Walks Essentials, Training Starter Kit, etc.
Filter by care_type works (e.g., ?care_type=grooming returns 1 bundle)
Response structure includes: id, name, price, items, care_type, bundle_type

features_verified.feature: Mira Context Panel on Pillar Pages
details: Travel page shows personalized Mira panel with user greeting
Panel shows pet name (Mojo) and personalized suggestions
Suggestions include 'Pet-Friendly Cab for Mojo' and 'Flight-Ready Travel'

critical_code_review_comments: Mira context endpoint properly handles both authenticated and unauthenticated requests
PetSoulScore component correctly calculates average score across all pets
Care bundles endpoint uses proper MongoDB projection {'_id': 0} to exclude ObjectId
PricingHub fetches Care bundles from dedicated /api/care/bundles endpoint
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/test_mira_context_care_bundles.py - Created test suite for Mira context and Care bundles
context_for_next_testing_agent: Mira AI personalization fix verified. POST /api/mira/context returns personalized greeting with user's first name and pet's name when authenticated. PetSoulScore component shows animated progress ring in navbar. Care bundles API returns 5 bundles. All features working as expected.

Mira Context API: POST /api/mira/context (without auth) - Returns welcome message with 'Sign in'
POST /api/mira/context (with auth) - Returns personalized greeting with user and pet name
Care Bundles API: GET /api/care/bundles - Returns all care bundles (5 total)

screenshots_taken: .screenshots/travel_page_logged_in.png - Travel page with personalized Mira panel
.screenshots/mira_panel_travel.png - Mira panel showing 'Hi Dipali! Planning travel with Mojo?'
.screenshots/pillar_bundles.png - PricingHub Pillar Bundles tab showing Care with 5 bundles
